overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a dense futuristic urban environment with towering residential blocks, neon signage, and mixed pedestrian and vehicle traffic on a clear sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with benches and graffiti

events.description: begins descending metal stairs from the elevated walkway toward street level

agents.ego_description: walking past a concrete bench with graffiti and descending stairs from an elevated plaza

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket sitting on bench looking at a device
two individuals sitting on a bench in the background

entered.detail: white concrete bench with red and black graffiti tags
tall green residential building with external fire escapes and numerous air conditioning units
white metal safety railing along the elevated walkway
steam rising from a vent on the walkway surface

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an elevated pedestrian plaza with a graffiti-covered concrete bench in the foreground. A man sits on the bench while the camera walks forward past metal railings, approaching stairs that descend toward the street level below. Tall green residential towers rise in the background under a clear blue sky.

events.description: exits stairs and enters street level intersection with vehicle traffic
crossing the street at a crosswalk with other pedestrians while vehicles wait

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and crossing the street at a crosswalk alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white van driving down the street approaching the intersection
pedestrian in white outfit crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: modern glass skyscraper with large white YAIBA signage
dark building with amber AMBER FOX signage on the upper floors
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall wooden utility poles with multiple crossbars and wires

segments.scene_description: The camera descends from the elevated plaza and emerges at street level, revealing the YAIBA glass tower and AMBER FOX building. The scene transitions to crossing a busy intersection with striped crosswalk markings, utility poles lining the right side, and the green apartment tower now visible on the left. Pedestrians cross alongside while a white van approaches in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with shops and advertisements

events.description: enters covered walkway with overhead awning protection and commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered sidewalk past vending machines, digital billboards, and shop fronts

notable_agents.action: vendor arranging newspapers and magazines at a sidewalk stand
woman in athletic wear stretching near a storefront entrance

entered.detail: overhead concrete awning providing partial cover over the sidewalk
large digital advertisement kiosk displaying a smiling man with cybernetic implants and ALL FOODS branding
futuristic vending machine with glowing interface near the shop entrance
traditional red Japanese-style paper lanterns hanging outside a restaurant
outdoor rack displaying newspapers and magazines for sale

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered commercial walkway, the scene shifts to a sheltered sidewalk with green pavement tiles. The camera passes a prominent ALL FOODS digital billboard, a newspaper stand on the left, and red paper lanterns marking a restaurant entrance. The overhead awning creates mixed lighting conditions while pedestrians browse the various storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban street canyon with towering buildings and construction

events.description: exits covered walkway into open street with vehicle traffic and wider view
camera tilts upward to look at the tall towers and construction crane overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the street and looking up at the towering buildings and construction crane

notable_agents.action: red vintage-style car driving past on the street
person sitting on cardboard boxes near large ventilation units

entered.detail: massive industrial ventilation fans mounted on the building exterior
large yellow construction crane extending above the skyline
very tall mixed-use tower with construction scaffolding and incomplete upper floors
classic red car with white roof driving along the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway, the scene opens into a dense urban canyon with a red vintage car passing by on the left. Large industrial HVAC units dominate the right side of the frame while the camera continues forward. Toward the end of the segment, the camera tilts upward to reveal a massive construction crane and an unfinished tower rising above the surrounding buildings, emphasizing the vertical scale of the cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an elevated residential plaza down into the dense, vertical depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins by moving past a graffiti-covered bench and metal railings on a high plaza, descending a set of stairs that lead away from towering green residential blocks under a clear blue sky. As the camera emerges at street level, the scene opens into a busy intersection featuring the YAIBA glass tower and AMBER FOX building, where the camera crosses striped pavement alongside pedestrians and oncoming traffic. The movement then shifts into a sheltered commercial walkway, transitioning from open sunlight to the mixed lighting of an overhead awning adorned with red lanterns and a digital ALL FOODS billboard. Finally, the camera exits the covered area into a narrow street flanked by industrial HVAC units and passing vintage cars, before tilting upward to reveal a massive construction crane and an unfinished skyscraper looming over the city.
